description: Obstruction-focused early questioning. Pain pattern, vomiting, bowel function, and bleeding negatives come first.
source: Added for the 71M intestinal obstruction dynamic-status scenario
questions: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
When did this abdominal pain start, and where is it located?
Does the pain come in waves, and how severe does it get?
Have you been vomiting, and has there been any blood or green bile?
Have you been constipated, had diarrhea, or passed any blood or black stool?
Have you had similar episodes before, and are they happening more often?
